requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — DTI / BPS (PNS IEC 62368-1 / RA 7394) — 220 V / 60 Hz
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——DTI / BPS（PNS IEC 62368-1 / RA 7394）——220V / 60Hz
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——DTI / BPS（PNS IEC 62368-1 / RA 7394）——220 V / 60 Hz

summary.en: Consumer electronics and information technology equipment sold in the Philippines must comply with electrical safety requirements under Republic Act 7394 (Consumer Act of the Philippines), enforced by the Department of Trade and Industry (DTI). The Bureau of Philippine Standards (BPS) under DTI publishes Philippine National Standards (PNS) that adopt IEC international standards, including PNS IEC 62368-1 (Audio / Video, Information and Communication Technology Equipment Safety). BPS-accredited laboratories or DOST-ITDI are the recognised testing bodies. Importers and distributors are responsible for ensuring products meet PNS safety requirements before sale. A critical Philippines-specific consideration is the power supply environment: the Philippines operates at 220 V / 60 Hz with Type A / B (US-style flat-blade) plugs. This is an unusual combination globally — most 220 V markets use 50 Hz and non-A / B plug types. Chinese devices are typically designed for 220 V / 50 Hz (Type A/C plug) — while the voltage matches, the 60 Hz frequency and A / B plug type require attention. Wide-input (100–240 V, 50–60 Hz) power adapters are generally compatible, but a plug adapter or replacement power cord for Type A / B outlets is required for devices with Chinese standard plugs.
summary.zh: 在菲律宾销售的消费电子和信息技术设备须依据《共和国法案7394》（菲律宾消费者法）满足电气安全要求，由贸工部（DTI）强制执行。DTI下属菲律宾标准局（BPS）发布采用IEC国际标准的菲律宾国家标准（PNS），包括PNS IEC 62368-1（视听、信息及通信技术设备安全）。BPS认可实验室或DOST-ITDI为认可检测机构。进口商和分销商负责确保产品在销售前符合PNS安全要求。菲律宾特有的关键考量是电源环境：菲律宾采用220V / 60Hz及A / B型（美式扁脚）插头。这是全球罕见的组合——大多数220V市场使用50Hz及非A / B型插头。中国设备通常为220V / 50Hz设计（A / C型插头）——虽电压相同，但60Hz频率和A / B型插头需特别关注。宽电压（100–240V，50–60Hz）电源适配器通常兼容，但配有中国标准插头的设备须备插头转换器或更换A / B型电源线。
summary.zht: 在菲律賓銷售的消費電子和資訊技術設備須依據《共和國法案7394》（菲律賓消費者法）滿足電氣安全要求，由貿工部（DTI）強制執行。DTI下屬菲律賓標準局（BPS）發布採用IEC國際標準的菲律賓國家標準（PNS），包括PNS IEC 62368-1（視聽、資訊及通信技術設備安全）。BPS認可實驗室或DOST-ITDI為認可測試機構。進口商和分銷商負責確保產品在銷售前符合PNS安全要求。菲律賓特有的關鍵考量是電源環境：菲律賓採用220 V / 60 Hz及A / B型（美式扁腳）插頭。這是全球罕見的組合——大多數220 V市場使用50 Hz及非A / B型插頭。中國設備通常為220 V / 50 Hz設計（A / C型插頭）——雖電壓相同，但60 Hz頻率和A / B型插頭需特別關注。寬電壓（100–240 V，50–60 Hz）電源適配器通常相容，但配有中國標準插頭的設備須備插頭轉換器或更換A / B型電源線。

standards_or_laws: Republic Act No. 7394 — Consumer Act of the Philippines (electrical safety and product standards enforcement by DTI / BPS)
PNS IEC 62368-1 — Audio / Video, Information and Communication Technology Equipment Safety (Philippine National Standard adopting IEC 62368-1)
Philippine power standard: 220 V / 60 Hz, Type A / B plugs (per Philippine Electrical Code and ERC / DOE standards)
BPS Accreditation Program — BPS-accredited and DOST-ITDI laboratories for safety testing
DTI Department Administrative Orders on mandatory product standards for consumer electronics

summary.en: Chinese consumer electronics and IT equipment safety is governed by GB 4943.1 (Information Technology Equipment Safety, aligned with IEC 60950-1) or the newer GB 4943.23 / GB 4943 series aligned with IEC 62368-1, enforced through CCC (China Compulsory Certification) under CNCA. CCC safety testing is conducted at CBTL or CNAS-accredited laboratories. Chinese devices are designed for 220 V / 50 Hz with GB/T 1002 two-round-pin (Type A / C variation) or GB 2099.1 plugs. Chinese CCC safety certification and GB-standard test reports are not recognised by Philippine DTI / BPS and do not substitute for PNS conformity assessment.
summary.zh: 中国消费电子和IT设备安全受GB 4943.1（信息技术设备安全，与IEC 60950-1对标）或与IEC 62368-1对标的较新GB 4943.23 / GB 4943系列标准管辖，通过CNCA主管的CCC（中国强制认证）强制执行。CCC安全测试在CBTL或CNAS认可实验室进行。中国设备为220V / 50Hz设计，配有GB/T 1002两圆脚（A / C型变体）或GB 2099.1插头。中国CCC安全认证及GB标准测试报告不被菲律宾DTI / BPS承认，不能替代PNS符合性评定。
summary.zht: 中國消費電子和IT設備安全受GB 4943.1（資訊技術設備安全，與IEC 60950-1對標）或與IEC 62368-1對標的較新GB 4943.23 / GB 4943系列標準管轄，通過CNCA主管的CCC（中國強制認證）強制執行。CCC安全測試在CBTL或CNAS認可實驗室進行。中國設備為220 V / 50 Hz設計，配有GB/T 1002兩圓腳（A / C型變體）或GB 2099.1插頭。中國CCC安全認證及GB標準測試報告不被菲律賓DTI / BPS承認，不能替代PNS符合性評定。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1 — Information technology equipment safety (aligned with IEC 60950-1) — CCC mandatory
GB 4943.23 / GB 4943 series — aligned with IEC 62368-1 (newer editions)
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — safety scope under CNCA; CBTL / CNAS lab testing
Chinese power standard: 220 V / 50 Hz, GB/T 1002 two-round-pin or GB 2099.1 plugs (Type A / C variation)
GB/T 2099.1 — Plugs and socket-outlets for household and similar purposes (Chinese standard)

gap.en: Chinese CCC electrical safety certification and GB 4943 test reports are not recognised by Philippine DTI / BPS and do not satisfy PNS IEC 62368-1 requirements. PNS-standard safety testing at a BPS-accredited or DOST-ITDI laboratory is required for Philippine market access. A critical practical gap is the power environment: the Philippines uses 220 V / 60 Hz with Type A / B (flat-blade) plugs, while China uses 220 V / 50 Hz with round-pin plugs. Exporters must verify that device power adapters are rated for 100–240 V and 50–60 Hz (wide-input) and that a Type A / B-compatible power cord or plug adapter is included, as Chinese GB-style round-pin plugs will not fit Philippine sockets without adaptation.
gap.zh: 中国CCC电气安全认证及GB 4943测试报告不被菲律宾DTI / BPS承认，不满足PNS IEC 62368-1要求。菲律宾市场准入要求在BPS认可或DOST-ITDI实验室进行PNS标准安全测试。关键的实际差距在于电源环境：菲律宾使用220V / 60Hz及A / B型（扁脚）插头，而中国使用220V / 50Hz及圆脚插头。出口商须核验设备电源适配器额定值为100–240V和50–60Hz（宽电压），并随附A / B型兼容电源线或插头转换器，因为中国GB式圆脚插头若不适配则无法插入菲律宾插座。
gap.zht: 中國CCC電氣安全認證及GB 4943測試報告不被菲律賓DTI / BPS承認，不符合PNS IEC 62368-1要求。菲律賓市場准入要求在BPS認可或DOST-ITDI實驗室進行PNS標準安全測試。關鍵的實際差距在於電源環境：菲律賓使用220 V / 60 Hz及A / B型（扁腳）插頭，而中國使用220 V / 50 Hz及圓腳插頭。出口商須核驗設備電源適配器額定值為100–240 V和50–60 Hz（寬電壓），並隨附A / B型相容電源線或插頭轉換器，因為中國GB式圓腳插頭若不適配則無法插入菲律賓插座。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — PNS IEC 62368-1 electrical safety conformity required under Republic Act 7394 and DTI / BPS product safety framework; BPS-accredited or DOST-ITDI laboratory testing required; 220 V / 60 Hz Type A / B plug environment must be accommodated
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 4943.1 / GB 4943 series safety compliance required; CCC for applicable product categories under CNCA; 220 V / 50 Hz GB round-pin plug standard

source.publisher: Bureau of Philippine Standards (BPS) — Department of Trade and Industry (DTI), Republic of the Philippines

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Philippine PNS IEC 62368-1 electrical safety is mandatory for consumer electronics under Republic Act 7394 and DTI / BPS enforcement. Chinese CCC and GB 4943 safety documentation are not recognised substitutes. BPS-accredited or DOST-ITDI laboratory testing is required. Exporters must also address the Philippines' unique 220 V / 60 Hz / Type A / B plug environment — verify wide-input adapter rating (100–240 V, 50–60 Hz) and include a Type A / B-compatible power cord or plug adapter, as Chinese round-pin plugs are incompatible with Philippine sockets.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 菲律宾PNS IEC 62368-1电气安全在《共和国法案7394》和DTI / BPS执法框架下对消费电子具有强制约束力。中国CCC和GB 4943安全文件不被视为等效替代。须在BPS认可或DOST-ITDI实验室进行测试。出口商还须应对菲律宾独特的220V / 60Hz / A / B型插头环境——核验宽电压适配器额定值（100–240V，50–60Hz），并随附A / B型兼容电源线或插头转换器，因为中国圆脚插头与菲律宾插座不兼容。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 菲律賓PNS IEC 62368-1電氣安全在《共和國法案7394》和DTI / BPS執法框架下對消費電子具有強制約束力。中國CCC和GB 4943安全文件不被視為等效替代。須在BPS認可或DOST-ITDI實驗室進行測試。出口商還須應對菲律賓獨特的220 V / 60 Hz / A / B型插頭環境——核驗寬電壓適配器額定值（100–240 V，50–60 Hz），並隨附A / B型相容電源線或插頭轉換器，因為中國圓腳插頭與菲律賓插座不相容。
